thought.text:
Looks good, hoist score variance.

Let me run more times to assess true score:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && for i in 1 2 3; do cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | grep "总分" | head -1; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && for i in 1 2 3; do cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | grep \"\u603b\u5206\" | head -1; done", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Multiple runs", "timeout": 2000}
